results.title: Lady Bird
results.overview: Lady Bird McPherson, a strong willed, deeply opinionated, artistic 17 year old comes of age in Sacramento. Her relationship with her mother and her upbringing are questioned and tested as she plans to head off to college.

results.title: Bird Lady
results.overview: A girl wanders for miles, shoeless and confused - until she stumbles on a house full of birds and the old lady who cares for them.

results.title: Bird Lady
results.overview: Beloved Savannah native Diana Churchill recalls a life incidentally revolving around watching, documenting, and photographing her "many feathered friends".

results.title: Lady Bird Sweded
results.overview: A short film parody of Lady Bird (2017) in the style of Italian Neorealism.

results.title: The Lady Bird Diaries
results.overview: From award-winning filmmaker Dawn Porter comes "The Lady Bird Diaries," a groundbreaking all-archival documentary film about Lady Bird Johnson, one of the most influential and least understood First Ladies. The feature film looks at the 123 hours of personal and revealing audio diaries that Lady Bird recorded during her husband’s administration. The film reveals Lady Bird as an astute observer of character and culture and a savvy political strategist. It recasts her crucial role in LBJ’s presidency and brings viewers behind the scenes of one of the most tumultuous and consequential periods in modern American history.

results.title: The Bird Lady
results.overview: This adventure invites us to enter the heart of a story, which Daniel, a now retired drawing teacher, told us concerning a brief but striking encounter which occurred in Paris, in 1967. When an asset manager asked him to draw up a plan of a 16th-century building in the heart of Paris, he went into the flat of an enthusiastic collector of birds, nicknamed “The Bird Lady”. Her home was an exotic enchantment of birds either flying around freely or in refined cages. The more Daniel explored it, the less he felt that he was in Paris.

results.title: Bird Lady vs. the Galloping Gonads
results.original_title: Bird Lady vs. the Galloping Gonads
results.overview: "A springtime Fantasy," everything comes joyfully together in mirthful mythic warmth as Bird Lad's white line on black background richly sprouts, blossoms and bursts with pantheistic fertility.

results.title: Lady Bird Johnson - birth, life, state and national contributions
results.original_title: Lady Bird Johnson - birth, life, state and national contributions
results.overview: 1997 documentary produced for Lyndon B. Johnson National Historical Park chronicling the life, public service, and environmental legacy of Lady Bird Johnson.

results.title: Catherine Called Birdy
results.overview: A teenage girl in Medieval England navigates life and tries to avoid the arranged marriages her father maps out for her.
